meaning: n.信任,信用,声望,荣誉,[财务]贷方,银行存款vt.相信,信任,把...归给
examples: Does the hotel take credit cards?
She was charged with credit card fraud.
He's been promoted—would you credit it?
Credit controls were lifted in October and banks have been quick to turn on the tap.
Likewise, Credit Suisse First Boston has talked about an exit from its merchant bank.
